paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.65, representing a decrease of 0.08% from the prior close and 25.92% over the past 22 sessions.

The recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, set for August 13, 2026, as well as discussions about the company's stock price and its potential value. Some headlines also mention the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns and the completion of a $375 million convertibles deal.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings.
